config_entries.label: Send Every
config_entries.description: How often a sensor value should be pushed out. For example, in above configuration the min is calculated after every 4th received sensor value, over the last 7 received values. Defaults to `5`.

config_entries.label: Window Size
config_entries.description: The number of values over which to calculate the min/max when pushing out a value. Defaults to `5`.
